use_cases: Showcasing a product feature with interactive 3D visual effects to increase engagement and conversion
Creating compelling hero sections that respond to user mouse movement with depth effects
Highlighting key value propositions with animated text reveals and call-to-action buttons
Displaying feature images with perspective transforms that create an immersive showcase experience
Building responsive feature pages that work across desktop and mobile viewports
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring 3D tilt effects controlled by mouse movement using Framer Motion. The component displays a feature spotlight with preheader, heading, description, CTA button, and an animated image that rotates based on cursor position, creating an immersive product showcase experience with smooth entrance animations and parallax-like interactions.
